conversations.content: I need a black Adidas T-shirt. Please buy one if its rating is higher than 4.5.

<function_thought>
I will begin by searching for a black Adidas T-shirt with a rating higher than 4.5. This matches the first step in the initialized function trajectory.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[search_product(product_name="black Adidas T-shirt", brand="Adidas", rating_min=4.5)]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The search for a black Adidas T-shirt with a rating higher than 4.5 yielded no results. I will now attempt to search for the same product without any rating restrictions to see if any items are available. This is necessary to proceed with the purchase if options are available.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[search_product(product_name="black Adidas T-shirt", brand="Adidas", rating_min=None)]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The search for a black Adidas T-shirt without any rating restrictions also yielded no results. This means there are currently no available black Adidas T-shirts to purchase. As a result, I cannot proceed with adding a product to the cart or checking out.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_list()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The attempt to retrieve a list of items failed due to an invalid tool response. Since there are no available products from the searches, I have exhausted the available options for fulfilling the user's request. Therefore, I will summarize that no black Adidas T-shirts are available for purchase at this time.
